sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113638" key="xeirokrathsi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χειρο-κρᾰτησία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n113638.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">seizure by violence,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nech.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2043.tlg001:1:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Heph.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.21</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.135</biblScope> </bibl> (both pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
